title: Idempotency Context
description: Common v1 idempotency context for risky commands and retry-safe flows.
$comment: Source: TECH-01 requires idempotency for risky commands and defines result values NEW_ACCEPTED, DUPLICATE_RETURNED, CONFLICT_REJECTED, EXPIRED_KEY_REJECTED, MISSING_KEY_REJECTED, IN_PROGRESS_RETURNED, FAILED_RETRY_ALLOWED, and FAILED_RETRY_BLOCKED.

idempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key used to prevent duplicate or incorrect results on retry.

scope.description: Scope in which the key is valid.

payloadFingerprint.description: Safe hash or fingerprint used to detect same-key different-payload conflicts.

expiresAt.description: Optional key expiry time when the contract defines TTL.

auditId.description: Audit record for the idempotent command.
